params.name: Writ of Eternal Hunt
params.description: A blood-sealed contract by a shadow syndicate, unbreakable even by the employer's death. Enforcers must complete the kill at any cost. Rooted in ancient blood oaths, it upholds the underworld's iron law through relentless pursuit.
params.ss1:
All ELMT DMG +2
Per Hitman intercepted, Snail ATK +1
Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
